title: carthamus tenuis subsp. gracillimus
intro: Carthamus tenuis subsp. gracillimus, also known as the slender safflower or slender false safflower, is a subspecies of the Carthamus tenuis plant, which is a flowering plant in the sunflower family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Carthamus tenuis subsp. gracillimus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
